title: CI workflow with staged AOT pipeline and interop tooling split
body:
## What was done

Added CI with workspace checks, **interop freshness** validation, ABI/dispatch parity tests, and **AOT smoke** tests—reflecting a staged compile pipeline rather than a single `cargo test` blob.

## Why it mattered

Prototype JIT/lowering work regressed easily without automated smoke coverage; CI encoded the minimum bar before compiler history moved to the dedicated submodule.

## Outcome

Patterns reused in compiler repo CI for v0.1+ release and pack flows.

source.subject: Add CI workflow with workspace checks, interop freshness validation, ABI/dispatch parity tests, and AOT smoke tests
